title: Paper Library — study Frontmatter
description: LOCAL consumer schema (S1) for the per-paper `study` doc frontmatter — the Personal Layer entry point + paper-map node. artifact_type MUST be `study` (registry v1.3: systematic synthesis of external references for internal use), authority `derived`. Doubles as the reading queue via reading_status/reading_tier. Validated as a YAML-subset object (the reference validator parses the frontmatter block into this shape).

paper_id.description: Links this study doc to its Source-Layer paper record.

topics.description: Many-to-many topic tags — NOT a single hierarchy (S0/C2: topics are views over a graph).

reading_status.description: Turns the study doc into the reading queue with no extra structure.

reading_tier.description: Reuses parallax's T1 must-read .. T4 skip scale for reading priority.

claims.description: claim_ids extracted from this paper into the brain-map (edges.schema.json).
